examples: I thought you must be a humbug all along, from the conceited way you talked.
That idea is a load of humbug.
This is all humbug and good humor, of course.
Apparently, that's what legions of us had in mind when -- humbug!
Mr Martin, who says he has owned lurchers for 18 years, wants Humbug to have a vasectomy rather than having the testicles removed completely.
